creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #7)

For powerpc64 I've synchronized to -r309656 and have
built the buildworld part on the powerpc64 itself. I
installed and rebooted and it is now running:

# uname -apKU
FreeBSD FBSDG5L 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #2 r309656M: Tue Dec  6 21:15:55 PST 2016     markmi@FreeBSDx64:/usr/obj/powerpc64vtsc_xtoolchain_kernel/powerpc.powerpc64/usr/src/sys/GENERIC64vtsc-NODBG  powerpc powerpc64 1200017 1200017

I also checked cross-building buildworld TARGET_ARCH=powerpc64 from amd64.


But. . .

I have yet to see what I can do for TARGET_ARCH=powerpc under
a powerpc build.
